struct.missingId: Root element must have an id attribute (required by DITA DTD)
struct.emptyId: Root element id attribute cannot be empty
struct.missingTopicTitle: DITA topic must contain a <title> element (required by DTD)
struct.missingMapTitle: DITA map should contain a <title> element
struct.emptyElement: Empty <{0}> element should be removed or filled with content

id.invalidNmtoken: ID "{0}" should contain only letters, digits, hyphens, underscores, and periods

key.undefined: Key "{0}" is not defined in any map
key.noTarget: Key "{0}" has no target (no href on keydef)
key.missingElement: Element ID "{0}" not found in target of key "{1}"
sch001.missingOtherrole: When role="other", the otherrole attribute is required.
sch002.missingOthertype: When note type="other", the othertype attribute is required.
sch004.collectionTypeNotAllowed: The collection-type attribute is not allowed on <{0}>.
sch010.deprecatedBoolean: The <boolean> element is deprecated. Use <state> with value="yes" or "no" instead.
sch011.deprecatedAltAttr: The alt attribute on <image> is deprecated. Use the <alt> child element instead.
sch012.deprecatedLongdescref: The longdescref attribute is deprecated. Use the <longdescref> element instead.
sch013.deprecatedQuery: The query attribute on <{0}> is deprecated.
sch014.deprecatedNavtitle: The navtitle attribute is deprecated. Use <navtitle> inside <topicmeta> instead.
sch015.deprecatedMapTitle: The title attribute on <map> is deprecated. Use the <title> element instead.
sch016.longShortdesc: Short description has {0} words. Consider keeping it under 50 words.
sch017.topicheadMissingNavtitle: The <topichead> element should have a navigation title.
sch020.xrefInTitle: Using <xref> in <title> is ill-advised because titles are often used as links.
sch021.requiredCleanup: The <required-cleanup> element indicates content that must be cleaned up before publishing.
sch022.trademarkChar: The {0} character should be represented using the <tm> element.
sch023.multipleSectionTitles: Section has {0} <title> elements. Only one is allowed.
sch030.imageMissingAlt: Image is missing alternative text. Add an <alt> element or alt attribute for accessibility.
sch031.objectMissingDesc: Object is missing a <desc> element for accessibility.
sch040.nestedXref: An <xref> element must not contain another <xref>.
sch041.forbiddenInPre: The <{0}> element should not appear inside <pre>.
sch042.abstractMissingShortdesc: The <abstract> element should contain a <shortdesc> for use in link previews and search results.
sch043.noTopicNesting: The <no-topic-nesting> element produces no output. It exists only to prevent topic nesting in the DTD.
sch045.singleParagraphBody: Topic body has only one paragraph. Consider moving this content to <shortdesc> instead.
sch046.idlessTitledElement: <{0}> with a <title> should have an id attribute for cross-referencing.
sch050.removedBoolean: The <boolean> element was removed in DITA 2.0. Use <state> with value="yes" or "no" instead.
sch051.removedIndextermref: The <indextermref> element was removed in DITA 2.0.
sch052.removedObject: The <object> element was removed in DITA 2.0. Use <audio>, <video>, or <include> instead.
sch053.removedLearning: The <{0}> learning specialization was removed in DITA 2.0.
sch054.audioMissingFallback: The <audio> element should contain a <fallback> element for accessibility.
sch055.videoMissingFallback: The <video> element should contain a <fallback> element for accessibility.
sch056.removedPrint: The print attribute was removed in DITA 2.0.
sch057.removedCopyTo: The copy-to attribute was removed in DITA 2.0.
sch058.removedNavtitle: The navtitle attribute was removed in DITA 2.0. Use <navtitle> inside <topicmeta> instead.
sch059.removedQuery: The query attribute on <{0}> was removed in DITA 2.0.
